summary.en: A mobile social-mapping service that uses your location to discover people, places, and events nearby.
summary.zh: 運用你的所在位置探索附近的人、地點與活動的行動社交地圖服務。

highlight.en: Backed by Sequoia Capital and New Enterprise Associates, Loopt built an interoperable location service so phone users always know who and what is around them.
highlight.zh: 由 Sequoia Capital 與 New Enterprise Associates 支持,Loopt 打造可互通的定位服務,讓手機用戶隨時掌握周遭的人與事。

summary.en: An SMS payment service that lets you send money to anyone in the US via cell phone text messaging.
summary.zh: 透過手機簡訊就能將錢轉給全美任何人的 SMS 付款服務。

highlight.en: Users text "pay amount phonenumber" to send free transfers confirmed by a personal PIN; the team joined Amazon in 2006 to build its mobile payments.
highlight.zh: 用戶只需傳送「pay 金額 電話號碼」即可免費轉帳並以個人 PIN 確認;團隊於 2006 年加入 Amazon 打造其行動付款。

summary.en: Malware detection and ad-moderation software for buyers and sellers of online media.
summary.zh: 為線上媒體買賣雙方提供惡意程式偵測與廣告審核軟體。

highlight.en: ClickFacts scans online ads and web pages to block malware and inappropriate content, and gives advertisers a real-time history of where their ads ran.
highlight.zh: ClickFacts 掃描線上廣告與網頁以阻擋惡意程式和不當內容,並為廣告主提供廣告投放位置的即時紀錄。

summary.en: Business intelligence solutions that turn raw data into insights for better decision-making.
summary.zh: 將原始資料轉化為洞察、協助做出更佳決策的商業智慧解決方案。

highlight.en: Infogami sets itself apart with subject-matter expertise, bridging information and collaboration to enhance shared decision-making within organisations.
highlight.zh: Infogami 以領域專業知識為核心,連結資訊與協作,強化組織內部的共同決策。

summary.en: A web-based platform aiming to merge the desktop environment with the Web.
summary.zh: 志在將桌面環境與網路融合的網頁平台。

highlight.en: Founded by Firefox creators Blake Ross and Joe Hewitt and seeded by Sequoia, Parakey was acquired by Facebook in July 2007.
highlight.zh: 由 Firefox 創造者 Blake Ross 與 Joe Hewitt 創立、Sequoia 種子投資,Parakey 於 2007 年 7 月被 Facebook 收購。

summary.en: Simmery was a consumer internet startup from YC's Summer 2005 batch.
summary.zh: Simmery 是來自 YC 2005 年夏季梯次的消費者網路新創公司。

highlight.en: A US-based consumer company from Y Combinator's Summer 2005 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2005 年夏季梯次、總部位於美國的消費者新創公司,後已停業。

summary.en: A better desktop search solution.
summary.zh: 更出色的桌面搜尋解決方案。

highlight.en: Memamp set out to improve desktop search for users, but the US-based B2B company has since shut down.
highlight.zh: Memamp 致力於改善使用者的桌面搜尋體驗,但這家美國 B2B 公司後已停業。

summary.en: A web calendar for anyone who wants to keep and share a calendar online.
summary.zh: 讓任何人線上保存與分享行事曆的網頁行事曆。

highlight.en: Kiko integrates with mobile and AIM for universal access, lets you share events with non-users, and parses plain text like "Pay gas bill every month".
highlight.zh: Kiko 整合手機與 AIM 以隨處存取,讓你與非用戶分享活動,並能解析「每月付瓦斯費」這類純文字。

summary.en: Collective intelligence solutions that help organizations make more informed decisions.
summary.zh: 協助組織做出更明智決策的群體智慧解決方案。

highlight.en: Chicago-based Inkling's prediction-market products are used by leading corporations and government agencies to reduce risk and improve forecasting.
highlight.zh: 總部位於芝加哥的 Inkling,其預測市場產品被領先企業與政府機構用以降低風險並改善預測。

summary.en: An online form builder that automatically creates the database and backend behind your forms.
summary.zh: 自動為表單建立資料庫與後端的線上表單製作工具。

highlight.en: Wufoo lets anyone build forms with no coding, generating the database and scripts automatically; SurveyMonkey acquired it in 2011.
highlight.zh: Wufoo 讓任何人無須寫程式即可製作表單,並自動生成資料庫與腳本;SurveyMonkey 於 2011 年收購。

summary.en: A full-featured wedding planning site that helps couples find vendors and ideas.
summary.zh: 協助新人尋找廠商與靈感的功能完整婚禮規劃網站。

highlight.en: Started in 2007 to make finding wedding vendors easier, Project Wedding grew a supportive community and curated content before joining the WeddingWire Network.
highlight.zh: 2007 年成立以簡化尋找婚禮廠商的流程,Project Wedding 發展出互助社群與精選內容,後加入 WeddingWire 網路。

summary.en: A service that lets users share places with photos, video, and descriptions from their phone.
summary.zh: 讓用戶用手機以照片、影片與描述分享地點的服務。

highlight.en: Flagr users can capture places on the go and turn them into custom maps that embed on any website.
highlight.zh: Flagr 用戶可隨時記錄地點,並將其變成可嵌入任何網站的自訂地圖。

summary.en: A browser-based photo editor you launch on any image with one click of a bookmarklet.
summary.zh: 用書籤工具一鍵啟動、在瀏覽器中編輯任何圖片的相片編輯器。

highlight.en: Snipshot let users crop, resize, adjust colors, and auto-enhance photos in the browser, then save back to the web; it was sold to Ansa in 2013.
highlight.zh: Snipshot 讓用戶在瀏覽器中裁切、縮放、調色與自動修圖再存回網路;2013 年售予 Ansa。

summary.en: Web-based apps that help bands communicate with fans and plan tours.
summary.zh: 協助樂團與粉絲溝通並規劃巡演的網頁應用程式。

highlight.en: Founded in 2006 by Altay Guvench, AudioBeta built tools for bands to make informed touring decisions through fan engagement.
highlight.zh: 由 Altay Guvench 於 2006 年創立,AudioBeta 打造工具讓樂團透過粉絲互動做出明智的巡演決策。

summary.en: Software that makes your inbox and address book smarter by unifying every contact.
summary.zh: 整合每位聯絡人、讓收件匣與通訊錄更聰明的軟體。

highlight.en: Xobni surfaces everyone you've emailed, called, or texted with a full contact view including email history plus LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter updates.
highlight.zh: Xobni 整理出你曾通信、通話或傳訊的所有人,提供含郵件紀錄及 LinkedIn、Facebook、Twitter 更新的完整聯絡人檢視。

summary.en: Community-curated catalogs for product recommendations.
summary.zh: 由社群策劃的商品推薦型錄。

highlight.en: Anyone could create catalog pages to editorialize products and earn a share of the referral bonus on sales; Zanbazaar shut down in 2007.
highlight.zh: 任何人都能建立型錄頁面評介商品,並從成交的推薦獎金中分潤;Zanbazaar 於 2007 年停業。

summary.en: An attempt to build a social network and search engine around clothing.
summary.zh: 嘗試圍繞服飾打造社交網路與搜尋引擎的服務。

highlight.en: Shoutfit tried to create a social network centered on clothing, and briefly built a clothing search engine before shutting down.
highlight.zh: Shoutfit 嘗試打造以服飾為核心的社交網路,並短暫建立過服飾搜尋引擎,後已停業。

summary.en: An online community for listening to and remixing user-contributed music.
summary.zh: 讓人聆聽與混音用戶貢獻音樂的線上社群。

highlight.en: Jamglue let users mix tracks from a library of community-uploaded music, blending creation and listening in one social platform.
highlight.zh: Jamglue 讓用戶從社群上傳的音樂庫中混音,在單一社交平台融合創作與聆聽。

summary.en: An online personality test game where you pick which of two photos you like better.
summary.zh: 從兩張照片中選出你更喜歡哪張的線上性格測驗遊戲。

highlight.en: Likebetter turned a simple two-photo choice into a personality test game, inferring traits from which image users preferred.
highlight.zh: Likebetter 將二選一的照片選擇變成性格測驗遊戲,從用戶偏好的圖片推斷其特質。

summary.en: A platform that bridges mobile text, email, and IM with no download required.
summary.zh: 無須下載即可串接手機簡訊、電子郵件與即時通訊的平台。

highlight.en: JumpChat let users send mass messages across SMS, email, and IM, delivering to whichever platform each recipient activates, focused on mobile messaging.
highlight.zh: JumpChat 讓用戶跨簡訊、郵件與即時通訊群發訊息,送達各收件人啟用的平台,並聚焦於大量行動訊息。

summary.en: Thinkature was a B2B startup from YC's Summer 2006 batch.
summary.zh: Thinkature 是來自 YC 2006 年夏季梯次的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A B2B company from Y Combinator's Summer 2006 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2006 年夏季梯次的 B2B 公司,後已停業。

summary.en: Talkito was a consumer startup from YC's Summer 2006 batch.
summary.zh: Talkito 是來自 YC 2006 年夏季梯次的消費者新創公司。

highlight.en: A US-based consumer company from Y Combinator's Summer 2006 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2006 年夏季梯次、總部位於美國的消費者新創公司,後已停業。

summary.en: A social polling site where the crowd answers your questions.
summary.zh: 由群眾回答你問題的社交投票網站。

highlight.en: Pollground let users easily create surveys and post questions and comments anonymously, tapping the wisdom of the crowd for answers.
highlight.zh: Pollground 讓用戶輕鬆建立問卷,並可匿名張貼問題與留言,借助群眾智慧取得解答。

summary.en: A search engine for electronic components.
summary.zh: 電子零件的搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: Octopart helps engineers compare components and find pricing, availability, and technical specs so part-hunting doesn't slow down design and manufacturing.
highlight.zh: Octopart 協助工程師比較零件並查詢價格、庫存與技術規格,讓找料不再拖慢設計與製造。

summary.en: An accessible server admin tool for managing websites from desktop and mobile.
summary.zh: 讓非技術人員從桌面與行動裝置管理網站的易用伺服器管理工具。

highlight.en: Virtualmin challenges tools like Plesk with one-click installs of popular software such as content management systems, aimed at non-technical site owners.
highlight.zh: Virtualmin 以一鍵安裝內容管理系統等熱門軟體挑戰 Plesk 等工具,鎖定非技術型網站主。

summary.en: A messaging platform that delivers updatable mobile apps via a link.
summary.zh: 透過連結傳遞可即時更新行動應用的訊息平台。

highlight.en: Tsumobi created its own language atop J2ME so developers could update apps on the fly and enabled phones would get changes just by visiting a link.
highlight.zh: Tsumobi 在 J2ME 之上自創語言,讓開發者能即時更新應用,啟用裝置只需點連結即可取得變更。

summary.en: A web-based presentation app, like "the Gmail of slides."
summary.zh: 如同「投影片版 Gmail」的網頁簡報應用。

highlight.en: Zenter offered PowerPoint-like features with web content like Google Images and a public remix library; Google acquired it in June 2007.
highlight.zh: Zenter 提供類 PowerPoint 功能,可直接加入 Google 圖片等網路內容並設公開混搭庫;Google 於 2007 年 6 月收購。

summary.en: An auction and marketplace management system for online sellers.
summary.zh: 為線上賣家打造的拍賣與市集管理系統。

highlight.en: Auctomatic helps sellers on eBay, Amazon, and Overstock list and manage sales while optimizing for profit; Gmail lead developer Paul Buchheit invested.
highlight.zh: Auctomatic 協助 eBay、Amazon、Overstock 賣家上架與管理銷售並優化利潤;Gmail 主力開發者 Paul Buchheit 曾投資。

summary.en: A collaborative writing web app for drafting, editing, and publishing as a group.
summary.zh: 供團隊撰稿、編輯與發布的協作寫作網頁應用。

highlight.en: Writewith offers version control, task assignment, and inline comments for real-time group editing, and was in beta with 15 college newspapers.
highlight.zh: Writewith 提供版本控制、任務分配與行內留言以即時協作編輯,並在 15 家大學報社中進行測試。

summary.en: A social network for the music industry connecting bands, agents, publicists, and venues.
summary.zh: 連結樂團、經紀人、公關與場館的音樂產業社交網路。

highlight.en: Whitenoise gave bands map-based tour management and venue search, while letting venues browse local artists and book shows.
highlight.zh: Whitenoise 讓樂團以地圖管理巡演並搜尋場館,也讓場館瀏覽當地藝人並安排演出。

summary.en: A community for posting thoughts, gossip, and secrets anonymously.
summary.zh: 匿名張貼想法、八卦與祕密的社群。

highlight.en: Socialmoth saw over 600 anonymous posts a day, mostly from women, and planned Disenchat for verified anonymous workplace gossip.
highlight.zh: Socialmoth 每天有逾 600 則匿名貼文,多來自女性,並計畫推出經驗證的匿名職場八卦平台 Disenchat。

summary.en: A personal finance tool that helps you make better spending decisions.
summary.zh: 協助你做出更佳消費決策的個人理財工具。

highlight.en: Buxfer aims to make it easy to manage money and improve everyday spending decisions.
highlight.zh: Buxfer 致力於讓管理金錢變得簡單,並改善日常的消費決策。

summary.en: An active clad-alignment fiber fusion splicer with very high image magnification.
summary.zh: 具備極高影像放大率的主動包層對準光纖熔接機。

highlight.en: View 3 is an active clad-alignment splicer billed as having the world's highest fiber image magnification rate for dependable fusion splicing.
highlight.zh: View 3 是主動包層對準熔接機,標榜全球最高的光纖影像放大率,提供可靠的熔接。

summary.en: Free messaging on mobile phones, bridging IM with SMS.
summary.zh: 串接即時通訊與簡訊的免費手機訊息服務。

highlight.en: Heysan grew a mobile community of over 1 million users sending tens of millions of monthly messages, and was acquired by Good Technology in 2009.
highlight.zh: Heysan 發展出逾百萬用戶的行動社群、每月傳送數千萬則訊息,並於 2009 年被 Good Technology 收購。

summary.en: Eivod was a B2B startup from YC's Summer 2007 batch.
summary.zh: Eivod 是來自 YC 2007 年夏季梯次的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A US-based B2B company from Y Combinator's Summer 2007 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2007 年夏季梯次、總部位於美國的 B2B 公司,後已停業。

summary.en: Media in the cloud — cloud storage for your files and media.
summary.zh: 雲端媒體服務,讓你的檔案與媒體存放雲端。

highlight.en: ZumoDrive offered cloud-based storage that put a user's media in the cloud for anywhere access, and was later acquired.
highlight.zh: ZumoDrive 提供雲端儲存,將用戶媒體放上雲端以隨處存取,後被收購。

summary.en: The live music service that helps fans track artists and never miss a concert.
summary.zh: 協助樂迷追蹤藝人、不錯過任何演唱會的現場音樂服務。

highlight.en: With over 6 million event listings, Songkick spans web, iPhone, and Android with partnerships across Spotify, Pandora, and Facebook to power concert discovery.
highlight.zh: Songkick 擁有逾 600 萬筆活動資訊,橫跨網頁、iPhone 與 Android,並與 Spotify、Pandora、Facebook 合作推動演唱會探索。

summary.en: Blue Frog Gaming is a consumer gaming company from YC's Summer 2007 batch.
summary.zh: Blue Frog Gaming 是來自 YC 2007 年夏季梯次的消費者遊戲公司。

highlight.en: A US-based consumer gaming company from Y Combinator's Summer 2007 batch.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2007 年夏季梯次、總部位於美國的消費者遊戲公司。

summary.en: A commenting platform that lets you add comments to your website.
summary.zh: 讓你為網站加上留言功能的評論平台。

highlight.en: Founded in 2007, Disqus powers comments across over 4 million websites and pairs its network with an advertising business and owned platform.
highlight.zh: Disqus 成立於 2007 年,為逾 400 萬個網站提供留言功能,並結合廣告網路與自有平台。

summary.en: A single-sign-on service for logging into many websites with one password.
summary.zh: 以單一密碼登入多個網站的單一登入服務。

highlight.en: San Francisco-based Clickpass provided single-sign-on so users could access various websites with one password.
highlight.zh: 總部位於舊金山的 Clickpass 提供單一登入,讓用戶以一組密碼存取多個網站。

summary.en: Upload your music collection and play it anywhere from the web.
summary.zh: 上傳你的音樂收藏,並從網路隨處播放。

highlight.en: Anywhere.fm offered an iTunes-like web player with social features like profiles and Friend Radio for discovering new music.
highlight.zh: Anywhere.fm 提供類 iTunes 的網頁播放器,並加入個人檔案與 Friend Radio 等社交功能以探索新音樂。

summary.en: An online programming tool for building simple web apps in JavaScript.
summary.zh: 用 JavaScript 打造簡單網頁應用的線上開發工具。

highlight.en: Founded by ex-MIT students, AppJet let users code web apps in a browser editor with bundled libraries for databases and the Facebook API.
highlight.zh: 由前 MIT 學生創立,AppJet 讓用戶在瀏覽器編輯器中以內建資料庫與 Facebook API 函式庫撰寫網頁應用,並運行於自有虛擬化系統。

summary.en: A price search engine that finds shoppers lower, more accurate prices.
summary.zh: 為消費者找出更低且更準確價格的比價搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: Starting with electronics and appliances, Bountii built a search engine to find better prices than existing comparison services, aiming to cover any product.
highlight.zh: Bountii 從電子產品與家電起步,打造比現有比價服務更能找出好價的搜尋引擎,並計畫擴展至任何商品。

summary.en: A social music site where users vote on submitted singles, Digg-style.
summary.zh: 讓用戶以 Digg 式投票評選投稿單曲的社交音樂網站。

highlight.en: iJigg's home page surfaced what the community was "jigging," letting users rate songs, embed them on MySpace, and find similar music fans.
highlight.zh: iJigg 首頁呈現社群正在「jigging」的熱門單曲,讓用戶評分歌曲、嵌入 MySpace 並結識口味相近的樂迷。

summary.en: An online image editor notable for its layer effects, formerly known as fauxto.
summary.zh: 以圖層效果著稱的線上圖片編輯器,前身為 fauxto。

highlight.en: Splashup brought advanced tools like image editing layer effects to the browser, distinguishing it from other web-based photo editors.
highlight.zh: Splashup 將圖層效果等進階工具帶入瀏覽器,使其有別於其他網頁相片編輯器。

summary.en: A web service that makes running promotions and giveaways from any website easy.
summary.zh: 讓任何網站輕鬆舉辦促銷與抽獎的網路服務。

highlight.en: ContestMachine handled the details of running contests: collecting submissions, contacting winners, and setting entry rules, timing, and prizes; now closed.
highlight.zh: ContestMachine 處理舉辦競賽的細節,包含收集投稿、聯繫得獎者並設定參加條件、時程與獎品;現已停業。

summary.en: A platform where stock investors could exchange and share their picks.
summary.zh: 讓股票投資人交流與分享選股的平台。

highlight.en: SocialPicks gave stock investors a place to exchange ideas and share their investment picks before shutting down.
highlight.zh: SocialPicks 為股票投資人提供交流想法與分享選股的場所,後已停業。

summary.en: Peer-to-peer music sharing that streams music from your friends.
summary.zh: 從朋友處串流音樂的點對點音樂分享服務。

highlight.en: Reble's Windows-only software let users stream music from friends who also installed it, launching public beta in February 2008.
highlight.zh: Reble 的 Windows 專用軟體讓用戶串流同樣安裝該程式的朋友音樂,於 2008 年 2 月推出公開測試。

summary.en: An online animation platform developed by Habit Industries.
summary.zh: 由 Habit Industries 開發的線上動畫平台。

highlight.en: Fuzzwich offered an online platform for creating animations, built by Habit Industries.
highlight.zh: Fuzzwich 提供建立動畫的線上平台,由 Habit Industries 打造。

summary.en: Biographicon was a consumer startup from YC's Summer 2007 batch.
summary.zh: Biographicon 是來自 YC 2007 年夏季梯次的消費者新創公司。

highlight.en: A consumer company from Y Combinator's Summer 2007 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2007 年夏季梯次的消費者公司,後已停業。

summary.en: A machine-learning company behind Adpinion, an early feedback-driven ad network.
summary.zh: 打造早期回饋驅動廣告網路 Adpinion 的機器學習公司。

highlight.en: Founded in 2006, Hello Chair built the SparseReduce recommendation engine, applied across ad targeting, Amazon and eBay discovery, and the Appsaurus app finder.
highlight.zh: 成立於 2006 年,Hello Chair 打造 SparseReduce 推薦引擎,應用於廣告投放、Amazon 與 eBay 探索及 Appsaurus 應用搜尋。

summary.en: Meetyu was a consumer startup from YC's Summer 2007 batch.
summary.zh: Meetyu 是來自 YC 2007 年夏季梯次的消費者新創公司。

highlight.en: A US-based consumer company from Y Combinator's Summer 2007 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2007 年夏季梯次、總部位於美國的消費者公司,後已停業。

summary.en: A tool to take back control of your time by tracking how you spend it.
summary.zh: 透過追蹤時間用法、助你重掌時間的工具。

highlight.en: RescueTime helps people set boundaries, protect focused work, and improve work/life balance by revealing how their time is spent.
highlight.zh: RescueTime 透過揭示時間花在何處,協助人們設定界線、守護專注工作並改善工作與生活平衡。

summary.en: A simpler way to build mobile apps using the best of HTML5 and native — a better PhoneGap.
summary.zh: 結合 HTML5 與原生優勢、更簡單打造行動應用的工具,堪稱更佳的 PhoneGap。

highlight.en: Trigger opened the mobile app market to web developers and raised $1.8M in seed funding from Y Combinator and SV Angel.
highlight.zh: Trigger 讓網頁開發者得以進入行動應用市場,並從 Y Combinator 與 SV Angel 募得 180 萬美元種子資金。

summary.en: A web application company built on its Cappuccino framework and Objective-J.
summary.zh: 建立於自家 Cappuccino 框架與 Objective-J 之上的網頁應用公司。

highlight.en: 280 North's open-source Cappuccino toolkit, modeled on desktop development, powered 280 Slides, a browser app for presentations with PowerPoint import/export.
highlight.zh: 280 North 仿桌面開發打造的開源 Cappuccino 工具組,支撐了可匯入匯出 PowerPoint 的瀏覽器簡報應用 280 Slides。

summary.en: Simple third-party app patching and deployment for Windows.
summary.zh: 為 Windows 提供簡易第三方應用修補與部署。

highlight.en: Ninite is a one-click distribution platform for Windows software with built-in install, update, and security, each app in its own secure virtual space.
highlight.zh: Ninite 是一鍵式的 Windows 軟體發布平台,內建安裝、更新與安全機制,每個應用都在獨立的安全虛擬空間執行。

summary.en: A platform for user-generated quiz questions answered on-site or via a widget.
summary.zh: 提供用戶生成測驗題、可在站內或透過小工具作答的平台。

highlight.en: MightyQuiz lets users create, answer, and rate quiz questions, distributable beyond the site through an embeddable widget.
highlight.zh: MightyQuiz 讓用戶建立、作答與評分測驗題,並可透過可嵌入的小工具散布至站外。

summary.en: A search bar upgrade offering powerful inline commands for searching and account management.
summary.zh: 提供強大行內指令以搜尋與管理帳號的搜尋列升級工具。

highlight.en: Reminiscent of YubNub but aimed at a wider audience, Wundrbar adds inline commands that help people manage personal online accounts as well as search the web.
highlight.zh: Wundrbar 類似 YubNub 但鎖定更廣大的受眾,以行內指令協助人們管理個人線上帳號並搜尋網路。

summary.en: A Firefox extension for sharing links, described as "a Twitter for links."
summary.zh: 用於分享連結的 Firefox 擴充套件,號稱「連結版 Twitter」。

highlight.en: SocialBrowse was a Firefox extension that made sharing links social, likened to a Twitter for links.
highlight.zh: SocialBrowse 是一款讓連結分享變得社交化的 Firefox 擴充套件,被比喻為連結版的 Twitter。

summary.en: An online mixtape service for creating and sharing mixtapes.
summary.zh: 用於製作與分享混音帶的線上混音帶服務。

highlight.en: Mixwit, described as a mix of Slide and iTunes, made shareable mixtapes from songs found via MP3 search engines Seeqpod and Skreamr.
highlight.zh: Mixwit 被形容為 Slide 與 iTunes 的結合,以透過 Seeqpod、Skreamr 等 MP3 搜尋引擎找到的歌曲製作可分享的混音帶。

summary.en: A social micropayments engine for tips, donations, and digital content.
summary.zh: 用於小費、捐款與數位內容的社交微支付引擎。

highlight.en: Tipjoy let merchants sell digital content, charities raise money, and individuals give to one another through a simple, social payments engine.
highlight.zh: Tipjoy 透過簡單的社交支付引擎,讓商家販售數位內容、慈善機構募款並讓個人之間互相給錢。

summary.en: A campus-wide territory game spreading from Yale and Harvard to other colleges.
summary.zh: 從耶魯與哈佛擴展至其他校園的全校式佔領遊戲。

highlight.en: Kirkland North's game Turf pits campus sections against each other in a virtual battle for university-wide domination, expanding to schools like Stanford.
highlight.zh: Kirkland North 的遊戲 Turf 讓校園各區虛擬對戰爭奪全校主導權,並推廣至史丹佛與哈佛等學校。

summary.en: A service to relocate your online identity from social networks to your own website.
summary.zh: 讓你的網路身分從社交網路移回自有網站的服務。

highlight.en: Pitched as a distributed Facebook or inverted Ning, Deluux aimed to center identity on personal websites and distribute personalized content to drive traffic.
highlight.zh: Deluux 被定位為分散式 Facebook 或反向 Ning,意圖讓身分以個人網站為核心,並散布個人化內容以帶來流量。

summary.en: A mobile app for finding places to eat when you're out on the town.
summary.zh: 讓你外出時尋找用餐地點的行動應用。

highlight.en: YumDots used interactive maps to display local restaurant information, aiming to be more efficient than mobile review services like Yelp's.
highlight.zh: YumDots 以互動地圖呈現當地餐廳資訊,力求比 Yelp 等行動評論服務更有效率。

summary.en: A distributed job-advertisement network primarily for developer listings.
summary.zh: 主要刊登開發者職缺的分散式徵才廣告網路。

highlight.en: Snaptalent serves job ads across partner sites and detects visitors' IP addresses to target ads to, say, Google employees or Carnegie Mellon students.
highlight.zh: Snaptalent 在合作網站投放職缺廣告,並偵測訪客 IP 以針對如 Google 員工或卡內基美隆學生投放對應廣告。

summary.en: A specialized job and recruitment marketplace for STEM talent and employers.
summary.zh: 為 STEM 人才與雇主打造的專業徵才媒合市集。

highlight.en: Joberator offers a centralized platform where STEM graduates and professionals showcase skills and pinpoint employers with the highest hiring demand for them.
highlight.zh: Joberator 提供集中式平台,讓 STEM 畢業生與專業人士展示技能,並精準鎖定對其需求最高的雇主。

summary.en: Databases as a service, handling day-to-day database administration.
summary.zh: 以服務形式提供資料庫,代為處理日常資料庫管理。

highlight.en: FathomDB took over routine tasks for database administrators so they could focus on more complex issues.
highlight.zh: FathomDB 接手資料庫管理員的例行工作,讓他們能專注於更複雜的問題。

summary.en: A tool to edit and enhance online video; acquired by Google in July 2008.
summary.zh: 用於編輯與強化線上影片的工具;2008 年 7 月被 Google 收購。

highlight.en: Founded in 2007, Omnisio let users annotate and remix videos from any website and launched a slide-syncing tool before YouTube acquired it in July 2008.
highlight.zh: Omnisio 成立於 2007 年,讓用戶為任何網站的影片加註與混搭並推出投影片同步工具,於 2008 年 7 月被 YouTube 收購。

summary.en: Insoshi was a B2B startup from YC's Winter 2008 batch.
summary.zh: Insoshi 是來自 YC 2008 年冬季梯次的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A B2B company from Y Combinator's Winter 2008 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2008 年冬季梯次的 B2B 公司,後已停業。

summary.en: BitSample was a B2B startup from YC's Winter 2008 batch.
summary.zh: BitSample 是來自 YC 2008 年冬季梯次的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A B2B company from Y Combinator's Winter 2008 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2008 年冬季梯次的 B2B 公司,後已停業。

summary.en: An online technology school teaching web design, development, and more.
summary.zh: 教授網頁設計、開發等技能的線上科技學校。

highlight.en: Treehouse offers beginner-to-advanced courses from expert teachers, and in 2016 launched Techdegree to prepare students for tech careers in 6-12 months.
highlight.zh: Treehouse 提供由專家教師授課的入門到進階課程,並於 2016 年推出 Techdegree 學程,助學生在 6 至 12 個月內為科技職涯做準備。

summary.en: Interactive meetings and presentations with live audience responses.
summary.zh: 讓觀眾即時回應的互動式會議與簡報工具。

highlight.en: Poll Everywhere turns PowerPoint, Keynote, and Google Slides into two-way conversations with live mobile responses, used by over 75% of the Fortune 500.
highlight.zh: Poll Everywhere 將 PowerPoint、Keynote 與 Google 簡報變成雙向對話並即時呈現手機回應,獲 HP、Volvo、KPMG 及逾 75% 財星 500 大採用。

summary.en: Dead-simple blogging by email — publish a post just by sending a message.
summary.zh: 用電子郵件就能發文的極簡部落格服務。

highlight.en: Emerging from YC in 2008, Posterous made blogging as simple as sending an email and added Posterous Spaces with privacy controls for selective sharing.
highlight.zh: Posterous 於 2008 年從 YC 誕生,讓寫部落格如寄信般簡單,並推出具直覺隱私控制、可選擇性分享的 Posterous Spaces。

summary.en: A photo-sharing platform for families, including printing and digital frames.
summary.zh: 為家庭打造、含沖印與數位相框的相片分享平台。

highlight.en: Picwing prints and mails emailed photos every two weeks and offers Linux-based digital frames that display sent images within 20-30 seconds.
highlight.zh: Picwing 每兩週將郵寄來的照片沖印寄送,並提供 Linux 數位相框,可在 20 至 30 秒內顯示傳送的影像。

summary.en: A personal journal you'll actually keep, prompted by a daily email.
summary.zh: 以每日郵件提醒、讓你真正能持續寫的個人日記。

highlight.en: OhLife emails you each day asking "How'd your day go?" and builds your entire journal from your reply-by-email entries.
highlight.zh: OhLife 每天寄信問你「今天過得如何?」,並以你回信的內容累積成完整日記。

summary.en: Touchscreen-based customer feedback collected at the point of sale, with analytics.
summary.zh: 在銷售現場以觸控螢幕收集顧客回饋並提供分析。

highlight.en: Frogmetrics places touchscreens in restaurants and stores to gather on-the-spot feedback and leads, aggregating data across locations to surface trends.
highlight.zh: Frogmetrics 在餐廳與商店放置觸控螢幕,當場收集回饋與名單,並跨地點彙整資料以呈現趨勢與洞察。

summary.en: A free site for creating event invitations and organizing groups.
summary.zh: 免費建立活動邀請函與組織群組的網站。

highlight.en: Launched in 2008, Anyvite offers an efficient way to create invitations plus tools to organize and communicate with attendees throughout an event.
highlight.zh: Anyvite 於 2008 年推出,提供高效製作邀請函的方式,並附帶在整個活動期間組織與聯繫與會者的工具。

summary.en: A celebrity-tracking tool that aggregates sightings in real time; acquired by Google in 2011.
summary.zh: 即時彙整名人動態的追蹤工具;2011 年被 Google 收購。

highlight.en: Formerly real-time search engine Scoopler, JustSpotted aggregated celebrity activity from Twitter, Facebook, and Foursquare plus user-reported sightings.
highlight.zh: JustSpotted 前身為即時搜尋引擎 Scoopler,彙整來自 Twitter、Facebook、Foursquare 及用戶回報的名人動態。

summary.en: A web content recommendation engine that surfaces sites related to any page or topic.
summary.zh: 為任何頁面或主題推薦相關網站的內容推薦引擎。

highlight.en: Via a Firefox plug-in, Youlicit uses crowd wisdom to deliver relevant site recommendations as you surf, and connects users with shared interests.
highlight.zh: Youlicit 透過 Firefox 外掛運用群眾智慧,在你瀏覽時無須搜尋即推薦相關網站,並連結興趣相投的用戶。

summary.en: A real-time online group collaboration tool.
summary.zh: 即時線上團隊協作工具。

highlight.en: Team Apart offered real-time online collaboration for distributed groups working together.
highlight.zh: Team Apart 為分散各地的團隊提供即時線上協作。

summary.en: A secondary ticket market search and comparison engine for finding the best seats and prices.
summary.zh: 搜尋並比較二級票券市場以找出最佳座位與價格的引擎。

highlight.en: TicketStumbler searches thousands of listings from hundreds of brokers and exchanges, presenting them in an organizable format for easy ticket comparison.
highlight.zh: TicketStumbler 搜尋來自數百家票券商與交易所的數千筆票券,以可整理的格式呈現,方便比較票券。

summary.en: A bookmarklet for grabbing, saving, and sharing pieces of content from any page.
summary.zh: 用書籤工具擷取、儲存與分享任何頁面內容片段的服務。

highlight.en: Snipd let users save snippets from any page and gave sites a widget aggregating snips into heat maps that show which parts of an article draw most attention.
highlight.zh: Snipd 讓用戶儲存任何頁面的內容片段,並為網站提供小工具彙整擷取內容成熱區圖,顯示文章中最受關注的段落。

summary.en: An online music store where fans earn a cut when songs they bought sell again.
summary.zh: 粉絲在所購歌曲再次售出時可分潤的線上音樂商店。

highlight.en: Popcuts sold DRM-free songs for 99 cents and paid earlier buyers a bigger share of the proceeds each time a song they bought sold again.
highlight.zh: Popcuts 以 99 美分販售無 DRM 歌曲,每當歌曲再次售出時,較早購買者可分得更大比例的收益。

summary.en: Votable lists — a white-label social news platform you can add to your own site.
summary.zh: 可投票的清單,一款能加進自有網站的白標社交新聞平台。

highlight.en: Slinkset is a white-label social news platform that lets anyone launch their own Digg-style site and integrate it into their website.
highlight.zh: Slinkset 是白標社交新聞平台,讓任何人都能建立自己的 Digg 式網站並整合進自有網站。

summary.en: Job Alchemist was a B2B startup from YC's Summer 2008 batch.
summary.zh: Job Alchemist 是來自 YC 2008 年夏季梯次的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: A B2B company from Y Combinator's Summer 2008 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2008 年夏季梯次的 B2B 公司,後已停業。

summary.en: Social and environmental web analytics for understanding a site's carbon footprint.
summary.zh: 用於了解網站碳足跡的社會與環境網站分析。

highlight.en: CO2Stats calculates a site's greenhouse gas footprint from visitor and server data, then buys Green-E renewable energy certificates to offset it.
highlight.zh: CO2Stats 依訪客與伺服器資料計算網站的溫室氣體足跡,並購買 Green-E 再生能源憑證予以抵銷;2016 年 12 月被收購。

summary.en: An analytics company, acquired by Twitter in 2011.
summary.zh: 一家分析公司,於 2011 年被 Twitter 收購。

highlight.en: BackType was an analytics company from YC's Summer 2008 batch that was acquired by Twitter in 2011.
highlight.zh: BackType 是來自 YC 2008 年夏季梯次的分析公司,於 2011 年被 Twitter 收購。

summary.en: Precognate was a consumer startup from YC's Summer 2008 batch.
summary.zh: Precognate 是來自 YC 2008 年夏季梯次的消費者新創公司。

highlight.en: A consumer company from Y Combinator's Summer 2008 batch that has since shut down.
highlight.zh: 來自 Y Combinator 2008 年夏季梯次的消費者公司,後已停業。

summary.en: Claim and conquer your city in a location-based game.
summary.zh: 在這款定位遊戲中佔領並征服你的城市。

highlight.en: Claimspotting was a location-based game built around claiming and conquering parts of your city.
highlight.zh: Claimspotting 是一款以佔領並征服城市各處為核心的定位遊戲。

summary.en: A service for managing email lists and publishing to the web in one place.
summary.zh: 在單一平台管理電子郵件清單並發布至網站的服務。

highlight.en: Similar to Google Groups, People & Pages combined email-list management with WYSIWYG website creation, competing with Google Sites and Weebly.
highlight.zh: People & Pages 類似 Google Groups,結合郵件清單管理與所見即所得的網站製作,與 Google Sites、Weebly 競爭。
